baslik: Bunu Çiz, Sonra Öl! Teaser Fragmanı, Ek Oyuncular ve Yeni Görsel Ortaya Çıkıyor
ozet: Yaklaşan Draw This, Then Die! için bir teaser fragmanı, ek oyuncular ve "Lost World" görseli ortaya çıktı! Televizyon anime dizisi....
tamMetin:
A teaser trailer and additional cast members, and “Lost World” visual have been revealed for the upcoming Draw This, Then Die! TV anime series. The anime is scheduled to begin broadcasting in Japan in July 2026.

The newly announced four additional cast members (from left to right below) include:

They join a main voice cast that stars:

The “Lost World” visual showcases the character Rei Teshima.

Hiroaki Akagi (The Dangers in My Heart) is directing the anime series, with Hiroko Fukuda (You Were Experienced, I Was Not: Our Dating Story) as series composer and Kenji Sagawa (UniteUp! sub-character designer) as character designer. Shin-Ei Animation is in charge of the animation production.

The anime adaptation is the coming-of-age manga series by Minoru Toyoda, which was first serialized in Shogakukan’s Monthly Shonen Sunday (Gessan) magazine on November 12, 2021. Eight tankobon volumes have been published in Japan as of October 2025.

The manga was also the winner of the 16th Manga Taisho Award and the 70th Shogakukan Manga Award.

Seven Seas Entertainment licensed the Draw This, Then Die! manga for English release, describing the main synopsis as:

To be an artist is to sacrifice everything for your craft! One wannabe manga artist is about to experience the reality of being a creator when she decides to jump into the world of manga. The award-winning manga series about the ups and downs of creating manga and being an artist—soon to be an anime!

Yasumi Ai, a first-year high schooler living on the remote island of Izu Ōshima, has one obsession: manga. When she discovers that her long-idolized but reclusive favorite manga creator, Hoshino-sensei, will make a rare appearance at Comitia, Ai doesn’t hesitate—she has to meet her hero. But that single decision sets off a chain of encounters that will shatter her assumptions about art, genius, and what it truly means to create.

Sources: Draw This, Then Die! Official Twitter (2) (3), Anime News Network
